message:
test(ftui-runtime): add 14 proptest invariants for allocation budget monitor

Property-based tests for the dual CUSUM + e-process leak detector covering:
CUSUM non-negativity, e-value bounds, frame counting, alert reset behavior,
summary consistency, determinism, calibrated config validation, and no-panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
